description_long: This object features a horizontal cylindrical base with metallic texture and brown end caps, supporting a circular sign mounted on top. The circular sign displays a colorful target pattern with concentric rings in blue, red, yellow, and white, reminiscent of an archery or shooting target. The base appears robust and industrial, likely made of metal, and includes a handle-like structure on one side for portability or mounting. The sign is attached to the base with a short, sturdy post, ensuring stability. The overall design suggests durability for outdoor use, with the vivid target pattern intended to attract attention. The object is compact and portable, suitable for temporary placement in urban environments.
description: A metallic horizontal base with brown end caps supports a circular sign featuring a colorful target pattern. The structure is robust and portable, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full target pattern on the circular sign and the entire length of the metallic base with brown end caps.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the circular sign and the handle-like structure attached to the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the circular sign and the metallic base, with no visible target pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the handle structure and the edge of the circular sign, showing the brown end cap in detail.
